name: WellFit Agent Control Center
purpose: Connect existing WellFit agent catalog, task queue, approved build backlog, risk classifier, definition of done, research governance, quality gate, PR review, decision log, progress log, and work-log structures into one controlled proposal and approval model without creating a parallel runtime architecture.

approvalScopes: Low-/Medium-Agenten, wenn Policy, Scope-Allowlist, Pflichtchecks und Audit-Log greifen
High/Critical-Agenten nur mit Reviewplan, exakter Einzelaufgabe, Stop-Bedingungen und Owner-Audit-Note
approvalBoundaries: Freigaben muessen auditierbar und scope-bound sein.
Eine Freigabe gilt nur fuer den dokumentierten naechsten kontrollierten Schritt.
Firebase Auth-/Rollen-Anbindung bleibt ein separater Follow-up, solange keine serverseitige Rollenpruefung produktiv verdrahtet ist.

status_legend.built: Framework, Register, Validator oder read-only Sicht sind vorhanden. Dies bedeutet keine Runtime-Autoritaet, keine Produktfreigabe, keinen Merge, keinen Deploy und keine Protected-Scope-Freischaltung.
status_legend.approved_for_planning: Ein Konzept-, Report- oder Planungs-Agent darf einen Vorschlag, Bericht, Scope-Entwurf oder Reviewplan vorbereiten. Dies erlaubt keine Produkt- oder Runtime-Aenderung.
status_legend.approved_for_build: Eine exakt freigegebene, einzelne Build-Aufgabe darf nur in den benannten Pfaden und mit den benannten Tests/Checks umgesetzt werden. Kritische Bereiche benoetigen Owner-Freigabe, Reviewplan und Stop-Bedingungen.
status_legend.blocked: Der naechste Schritt ist gesperrt, bis eine menschliche Entscheidung, fehlende Information, exakte Scope-Allowlist, Tests oder ein Reviewplan nachgereicht wurde.
status_legend.report_only: Der Agent darf nur lesen, analysieren und berichten. Es duerfen keine Produktdateien, Runtime-Pfade, Daten, APIs, Firebase Writes, Merge-/Deploy-Flows oder Protected Scopes veraendert werden.
status_legend.docs_register_write: Nur die explizit erlaubten Dokumentations- oder Registerdateien duerfen aktualisiert werden. Dies ist keine Erlaubnis fuer Produktlogik, Runtime-Code, Compliance-Logik, UI-Aktionen oder produktive Writes.
status_legend.runtime_blocked: Runtime-Ausfuehrung, Produktwirkung, Server-/Firebase-Writes, Autoritaetslogik, Merge, Deploy und Protected-Scope-Aktivierung bleiben gesperrt, bis Bernd/Owner eine exakte Einzelaufgabe mit Pfaden, Tests und Reviewplan freigibt.

low.description: Documentation, registers, report-only findings, safe metadata synchronization.

medium.description: New analysis scripts, new admin concepts, new agent extensions, report-only validators.

high.description: Runtime code, user data, rewards, mission completion, backend authority, protected-adjacent product behavior.

critical.description: Token, wallet, payment, presale, health, child safety, location, camera/biometric, legal, Firestore rules, production deployment.

approval_rules: Low risk proposals may be prepared only after area approval and must remain inside allowed docs/register/report-only scopes.
Medium risk proposals need concept approval before any execution-ready task is generated.
High risk proposals require single-task approval, exact allowed paths, explicit blocked scopes, review plan, and required checks.
Critical risk proposals require Owner approval, audit note, manual-only execution, and must never auto-merge or auto-deploy.
No System Agent may approve its own proposal, execution, PR, merge, deploy, or repair.
Approved means the next controlled step may be prepared; it does not mean merge, deploy, runtime authority, protected-scope authority, or self-approval.

controlled_curiosity.purpose: Controlled Curiosity keeps WellFit research inside the existing proposal, approval, risk, and review governance instead of allowing automatic internet research or a parallel research architecture.
rules: Agent must detect and document the knowledge gap before proposing research.

Agent must create a research proposal before external research when the result would influence product, roadmap, website, investor, legal, privacy, health, child-safety, location, camera, payment, token, reward, or mission-authority topics.
The proposal must document purpose, source types, risk, expected value, and affected WellFit areas before approval.
Admin or Owner must approve the exact research scope before internet research begins; Owner approval is mandatory for high, critical, or protected scopes.
Automatic internet research is blocked for High/Critical risk or protected WellFit areas without explicit approval.
Research results must be saved as a document/report and cannot directly authorize implementation.

A second independent review must check source quality, source independence, risks, protected-scope impact, and applicability before incorporation into roadmap, website, investor text, or product concept.

authorized_approval_user.roleResolution: owner has highest authority; agent_admin is allowed only for low/medium, non-protected, policy-permitted concept approvals. Any real implementation must verify the authenticated user and role server-side before accepting an approval.

follow_up_required_for_real_approvals.separateAuthFollowUp: Firebase Auth and role binding must be implemented and reviewed in a separate follow-up before any real approval action is accepted.

bernd_admin_center_release_scope.purpose: Clarify what Bernd may release in the future Admin Center without turning the read-only register overview into runtime authority.
bernd_admin_center_release_scope.critical_area_rule: Implementation agents in critical or protected areas remain blocked until Bernd/Owner explicitly releases one exact single task with paths, tests/checks and a review plan. Concept/report planning approval does not unlock implementation.

agent_lifecycle.purpose: Concrete proposal-to-PR lifecycle for the Agent Control Center. Each step references existing registers, permits only report-only checks where listed, and preserves human-only merge/deploy authority.

ordered_steps.label: Proposal created
ordered_steps.entry_condition: A system agent or admin drafts a narrowly scoped proposal with purpose, non-goals, expected changed areas, risk assumptions, and required checks.

register_contract.agent-task-queue.json: Use taskCandidates, selectionRules, defaultRequiredChecks, globalForbiddenFiles, and globalForbiddenChanges to anchor the proposal in an existing task queue item or mark it as a new candidate.
register_contract.approved-agent-build-backlog.json: Check whether a matching approved backlog entry already exists; proposal creation alone must not create execution authority.
register_contract.agent-work-log.json: Record or prepare a work-log reference for proposal provenance and later audit evidence.

ordered_steps.label: Risk classified
ordered_steps.entry_condition: The proposal has an explicit low/medium/high/critical risk level, protected-scope assessment, and stop conditions.

register_contract.agent-task-queue.json: Compare allowed and forbidden files plus default checks against the proposed scope.
register_contract.approved-agent-build-backlog.json: Apply riskSemantics, backlogEntrySchema, runtimeCapabilityFieldDefinitions, and executionCapabilities before any build handoff.
register_contract.pr-review-policy.json: Pre-map protectedAreaChecks, humanReviewRequiredFor, and forbiddenAutoApprovalTopics that will be required if a PR is later created.

ordered_steps.label: Admin review
ordered_steps.entry_condition: A human admin/owner reviews scope, risk, linked registers, required checks, and blocked actions.

register_contract.approved-agent-build-backlog.json: Only exact approved entries may move toward a build draft; concept approval is not implementation approval.
register_contract.agent-work-log.json: Capture admin decision, requested revision, rejection, or owner escalation evidence.
register_contract.pr-review-policy.json: Confirm review inputs and protected checks that must appear in the eventual PR handoff.

ordered_steps.label: Task draft ready
ordered_steps.entry_condition: The Codex task draft includes exact allowed paths, blocked paths, checks, review plan, stop conditions, and expected PR diff scope.

register_contract.agent-task-queue.json: Use expectedPrOutput and jsonValidationChecks for the task draft contract.
register_contract.approved-agent-build-backlog.json: Use backlogEntrySchema and artifactStatuses to verify a build item is draft-ready but not automatically executable.
register_contract.agent-work-log.json: Prepare the audit entry that identifies branch/task draft provenance.

ordered_steps.label: Execution allowed
ordered_steps.entry_condition: Human approval for one exact task is present, required checks are named, and protected/runtime scopes remain blocked unless explicitly owner-approved with a review plan.

register_contract.approved-agent-build-backlog.json: ExecutionCapabilities may be used only within the exact approved entry and never as global runtime authority.
register_contract.agent-work-log.json: Record execution start/end, branch, commit, checks, and skipped checks.
register_contract.pr-review-policy.json: Carry requiredPRDescriptionFields and review checklist into the PR.
register_contract.pr-post-creation-guard.json: Prepare post-PR evidence requirements before the PR is opened.

ordered_steps.label: PR created
ordered_steps.entry_condition: A PR exists with changed-file summary, checks run, risks, skipped checks, linked registers, and human review notes.

register_contract.agent-work-log.json: Append or reference PR URL/number, branch, commit, and check summary.
register_contract.pr-review-policy.json: Validate requiredReviewInputs, requiredPRDescriptionFields, protectedAreaChecks, and forbiddenAutoApprovalTopics.
register_contract.pr-post-creation-guard.json: Run requiredPostPRChecks and collect requiredEvidence; report-only auto-merge eligibility is not merge permission.

ordered_steps.label: Checks reviewed
ordered_steps.entry_condition: Required checks, quality-gate output, PR policy output, protected path report, and skipped/failed check reasons have been reviewed.

register_contract.agent-work-log.json: Store final check results and failure classification when not green.
register_contract.pr-review-policy.json: Confirm humanReviewRequiredFor and reportOutputSchema before handoff.
register_contract.pr-post-creation-guard.json: Apply mergeabilityStates, checkStatusStates, safeRepairEligibilityRules, stopForHumanReviewRules, forbiddenAutoActions, and requiredEvidence.

ordered_steps.label: Human merge required
ordered_steps.entry_condition: The PR handoff is complete and explicitly stops at human merge/reject/revision decision.

register_contract.agent-work-log.json: Record final handoff state and next recommended human action.
register_contract.pr-review-policy.json: No agent may satisfy required human review by self-approval.
register_contract.pr-post-creation-guard.json: forbiddenAutoActions and allowedPRHandoffScope remain authoritative: merge/deploy are human-only and separate from report-only eligibility.

agent_lifecycle.runtime_guardrail: Allowed report-only scripts may read, validate, and summarize. They must not merge, deploy, approve, write production data, activate runtime authority, or alter protected scopes.

enabledNow: Product memory and knowledge core governance
Task draft schema and proposal queue visibility
blockedUntilDedicatedOwnerApprovedImplem: Firebase writes or production data writes
safe_live_activation.whyThisIsStillLive: The Agent OS is live as a visible, built, checkable, auditable operating layer in the app and registers. Safety gates prevent dangerous runtime authority while keeping agents active for reporting, learning questions, task drafting, and governance checks.

agentOsAutonomyLevels.currentLevelSummary: Agents may update governance documentation, project registers, and report-only validators within an approved scope, then commit and create a PR handoff. This does not grant product runtime authority.
agentOsAutonomyLevels.nextApprovableLevelName: Safe UI-/Copy-/Test-only runtime changes with human approval

levels.name: Safe UI-/Copy-/Test-only runtime changes with human approval
Protected runtime work with Owner approval, review plan, and checks
